hero.title: Discover La Paz, where the desert meets the sea
hero.subtitle: Live unforgettable adventures in the waters of Baja California Sur. Swim with sea lions, mobula rays, watch whales for the first time, and explore pristine beaches.

testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences in Baja California Sur.

items.name: Maria G.
items.text: Watching the sardine baitball with marlins was magical. Friendly crew and super safe.

items.name: James P.
items.text: La Ventana and mobula rays just inches away... unforgettable. Very well organized.

items.name: Alejandro R.
items.text: Marine biologist guide, comfortable panga, photos and video included. I'd do it again without hesitation.

comparison.title: What usually ruins a safari...
comparison.titleHighlight: and how we do it differently
comparison.subtitle: Direct comparison: what happens with many tours vs. how we work at Keabelmet

problems.title: Too many people on the boat
problems.text: Ever booked a tour and there were 20 people? The experience becomes chaotic and impersonal.

problems.title: No ethics and zero science
problems.text: Guides who don't respect the animals or explain anything... and that changes everything.

problems.title: Promised photos... that never arrive
problems.text: They charge you extra or they never show up. That's not professional.

solutions.title: Small groups
solutions.text: With us, never more than 8 per boat. More space, calm, and safety.

solutions.title: Keabelmet Guide
solutions.text: We share stories, animal behaviors, and best practices to protect wildlife.

solutions.title: Photos and video included
solutions.text: What you experience, you take home. We always include media to relive your safari.

expeditions.title: Our expeditions
expeditions.subtitle: Designed for responsible encounters with marine wildlife and unique landscapes.

whyUs.title: Why
whyUs.subtitle: We are passionate about sharing the magic of La Paz through authentic, sustainable, and unforgettable adventures

features.title: Local Expertise
features.text: Born and raised in La Paz, we know every corner and the best times to visit each spot

features.title: Safety First
features.text: Certified guides, quality equipment, and comprehensive insurance for your complete peace of mind

features.title: Small Groups
features.text: Intimate experiences with a maximum of 8-12 people for personalized attention and authentic connections

features.title: Eco-Conscious
features.text: Committed to sustainable tourism and protecting the incredible marine and desert ecosystems of La Paz

whyUs.bio_text: Our team is made up of marine biologists from La Paz with years of experience organizing camps and expeditions in remote areas.
whyUs.edu_text: Education, conservation, and responsible tourism are the foundation of everything we do. Every expedition is an opportunity to learn and protect.

consequences.title: If you choose wrong, you could miss out on...
items: Real encounters due to poor logistics or massive groups.
Inadequate water safety and little guidance.
Negative impact on wildlife from bad practices.
No photos or video... and memories that won't come back.

items.q: Do I need prior snorkeling experience?
items.a: No prior experience needed. We provide a life vest, wetsuit, and full support so you feel safe.
Boat with captain, marine biologist guide, snorkeling gear, water and snacks, life vest, wetsuit, photos/video, educational materials, and binoculars.
These are seasonal experiences and we depend on nature. What we do guarantee is the effort: we work with expert local captains and guides.

cta.title: Your adventure in the Mar de Cortes starts here
cta.subtitle: Limited spots. Safe, responsible expeditions documented in photo/video.
